title: Worst Weekly Rout Since FTX Collapse -- $390 Billion Wiped From Crypto
summary: Bitcoin fell 17.3% and ether 22% this week in the largest crypto drawdown since the FTX collapse. $390 billion was wiped from the crypto market. The S&P 500 dropped 2.6% on Friday as strong jobs data raised rate hike fears.

stories.title: Worst Weekly Rout Since FTX: Bitcoin fell 17.3% and ether 22% this week
America's Largest Banks Build Digital Currency Network to compete with stablecoins
Satoshi-era Bitcoin moves after 14 years at center of $285B lawsuit
Arthur Hayes dumps WLD, Worldcoin plunged 20%
Polymarket goes mainstream as quant trading firms build prediction market desks
BlackRock's Securitize heading to NYSE after clearing key hurdle
Zcash AI bug researcher targets Monero after critical Zcash flaw
S&P 500 -2.6%, Nasdaq -4.2% in worst sell-off since Oct 2025
Fed rate hike now on the table as strong jobs data shifts expectations
US House circulates seven draft crypto bills for hearing next week

content:
RIEL'S MORNING CRYPTO & FINANCIAL BRIEFING
Sunday, June 7, 2026 | 9:00 AM CEST
=============================================

HEADLINE: Worst Weekly Rout Since FTX Collapse -- $390 Billion Wiped From Crypto

Good morning. This has been one of the most brutal weeks for crypto since the FTX collapse in November 2022. Here's your full briefing.

-----------------------------------------------
CRYPTO PRICE ACTION (Last 24h)
-----------------------------------------------

BTC: ~$61,400 (+0.7% 24h) | Weekly: -17.3%
  - Fell as low as $59,227 overnight before recovering above $61,000
  - Lowest price since October 2024
  - Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) sold bitcoin for first time since FTX era

ETH: ~$1,584 (-4.9% 24h) | Weekly: -22%
  - Worst weekly performance since FTX collapse

SOL: ~$63.52 (flat 24h)
XRP: ~$1.11 (+1.7% 24h)
BNB: ~$579 (+0.5% 24h)
DOGE: ~$0.083 (+2.2% 24h) | Fell 9% during the week
ADA: Dropped below $0.20 -- four-year lows. Hoskinson warned of "wave of failures"

DeFi sector market cap: $61.1B (down 7.2% weekly)
Total crypto market shed: ~$390 billion this week
Liquidations: ~$1.6 billion in leveraged positions wiped out

-----------------------------------------------
TOP CRYPTO NEWS STORIES
-----------------------------------------------

1. WORST WEEKLY ROUT SINCE FTX: Bitcoin fell 17.3% and ether 22% this week in the largest crypto drawdown since November 2022. Strategy's BTC sale, heavy ETF outflows (~$3B), AI investment competition, and Fed rate hike fears all contributed.

2. AMERICA'S LARGEST BANKS BUILD DIGITAL CURRENCY NETWORK: Major US banks are launching tokenized deposits to compete with stablecoins and prevent deposit drain to crypto platforms.

3. SATOSHI-ERA BITCOIN MOVES AFTER 14 YEARS: BTC at the center of a $285 billion lawsuit moved for the first time in 14 years.

4. ARTHUR HAYES DUMPS WLD: Worldcoin plunged 20% after BitMEX co-founder sold his position one day after saying he would keep holding.

5. POLYMARKET GOES MAINSTREAM: Major quant trading firms are building prediction market trading desks, signaling Polymarket and Kalshi are no longer niche.

6. BLACKROCK SECURITIZE HEADING TO NYSE: Tokenization firm Securitize cleared key hurdle to go public via approved merger registration.

7. ZCASH AI BUG RESEARCHER TARGETS MONERO: The researcher who used AI to find a critical Zcash flaw (crashing ZEC 38%) has added Monero to his audit queue.

-----------------------------------------------
TRADITIONAL FINANCIAL MARKETS
-----------------------------------------------

FRIDAY SELL-OFF WAS SEVERE:
- S&P 500: -2.6% (worst since Oct 2025) | $1.8 trillion wipeout
- Nasdaq: -4.2% (biggest one-day point drop EVER at 1,121 pts)
- Dow: -695 points (-1.35%)
- Semiconductors: Worst one-day plunge since March 2020, $1T+ erased
- Tech sector: -5.8%

CAUSE: Strong May jobs report (172K jobs, 4.3% unemployment) raised expectations that the Fed may RAISE rates. This triggered a broad risk-off rotation across stocks, bonds, crypto, and gold simultaneously. S&P 500 snapped a 9-week winning streak.

-----------------------------------------------
REGULATORY & MACRO DEVELOPMENTS
-----------------------------------------------

- US HOUSE TAX COMMITTEE: Seven draft crypto bills circulated for hearing next week, including small-transaction tax relief and mining/staking burden reduction.

- CLARITY ACT: Senator Alsobrooks says bipartisan crypto legislation is close but ethics and illicit finance concerns remain before Senate vote.

- FED RATE HIKE ON THE TABLE: Strong jobs data shifted expectations. Fed easing is "off the table" for 2026; a rate hike is now possible later this year.

- Republican senators pressing Fed, FDIC, and OCC to rewrite digital asset capital rules.

-----------------------------------------------
MARKET SENTIMENT & OUTLOOK
-----------------------------------------------

SENTIMENT: Deeply bearish short-term. Fear at extreme levels.

KEY FACTORS FOR THE WEEK AHEAD:
- Fed meeting upcoming -- all eyes on Chair Warsh's response
- SpaceX IPO trading begins June 12 -- potential crypto capital rotation
- $3B Bitcoin ETF outflows this week with no reversal signals
- Spot trading volumes at lowest since November 2023
- Bitcoin maximalists unfazed, calling this temporary AI-driven rotation

BULL CASE: Weekend bounce above $61K shows buyers stepping in. On-chain data shows no massive capital leaving crypto for SpaceX IPO.

BEAR CASE: Worst weekly decline in 3.5 years. ETF outflows accelerating. Rate hike fears mounting. Altcoins destroyed (ADA 4-year lows, WLD -20%). If BTC breaks $59K, expect further downside toward $55K.

TRADING NOTE: Extreme caution warranted. Not a capitulation bottom yet. Watch $59K BTC support and Sunday evening futures for directional cues.

-----------------------------------------------
Stay sharp. Risk management above all.

-- Riel
Crypto Trading Intelligence
=============================================
